steps.title: Use the ancestry clue
steps.content: Summer squash looks so unlike any wild plant that visual comparison was not enough. Genetic research was needed to establish that the wild Johnny gourd was its ancestor.

steps.title: Choose the verification verb
steps.content: Choice B means obtain, Choice C means create or improve, and Choice D means draw toward. None fits research proving an ancestral relationship. The needed verb means verify that the Johnny gourd is the ancestor. The answer is A.
